name: Julekake Dough
recipeIngredient: 1 Package Active Dry or Rapid-Rise Yeast (1 Tsp)
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the milk by heating to just below boiling point.
2. Pour the scalded milk into the bread pan, add butter and stir until melted.
3. Add the egg.
4. Add the flour, sugar, salt, cardamom, and yeast.
5. Set the machine to the Dough cycle and press Start.
6. After 15 to 18 minutes of mixing, add the cherries and raisins.
7. In about 1 1/2 hours, the machine will indicate the dough is ready. Remove the dough from the machine.
8. Shape into a round ball.
9. Place on a lightly greased cookie sheet. Cover and let rise in a warm place until almost doubled in size, 30 to 45 minutes.
10. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
11. Uncover the dough and bake for 30 to 35 minutes until golden brown and a wooden skewer inserted into the center of the loaf comes out clean and dry.
12. Cool loaf on a rack. Frost, if desired. Makes 1 large loaf.
